title: 이것은 헤즈볼라와의 전형적인 휴전이 아닙니다. 위협으로 간주되는 모든 움직임에는 대응이 이루어집니다. 즉, IDF는 헤즈볼라 사냥을 계속할 것입니다. 동시에 헤즈볼라는 이 거래에 동의하고 있으며 IDF는 레바논 남부에 남아 자리를 지키고 있습니다. - X: Osint613

titleEn: This is not a typical ceasefire with Hezbollah. Any movement deemed a threat will be met with a response. In other words, the IDF will continue hunting Hezbollah. At the same time, Hezbollah is agreeing to the deal while the IDF remains in southern Lebanon, holding positions up…
summary: 이것은 헤즈볼라와의 전형적인 휴전이 아닙니다. 위협으로 간주되는 모든 움직임에는 대응이 이루어집니다. 즉, IDF는 헤즈볼라 사냥을 계속할 것입니다. 동시에 헤즈볼라는 이 거래에 동의하고 있으며 IDF는 레바논 남부에 남아 자리를 지키고 있습니다.

summaryEn: This is not a typical ceasefire with Hezbollah. Any movement deemed a threat will be met with a response. In other words, the IDF will continue hunting Hezbollah. At the same time, Hezbollah is agreeing to the deal while the IDF remains in southern Lebanon, holding positions up to 10 km inside. So if tomorrow you hear about targeted air strike in Lebanon, don’t be surprised.

After pivoting from sneaker resellers, Slash is now profitable and gearing up to compete with Ramp and Brex.

summaryEn: Israeli government ministers were “outraged” by today’s announced ceasefire with Lebanon, which was revealed on TruthSocial by U.S. President Donald J. Trump who gave Israel’s consent to the ceasefire before it could be approved by the Israeli Security Cabinet, according to i24NEWS.
